name: Cottage Cheese Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine flour through salt.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the margarine and sugar. Beat in the egg. Add the cottage cheese and milk until smooth. Add the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened.
3. Fill sprayed muffin tins 3/4 full, and bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
